hero.title: Technology innovation for the future of health
hero.lead: We design secure AI platforms for healthcare & life sciences—turning data into better outcomes.

healthcare.introH2: We shorten the distance between scientific progress and recovery.
healthcare.introLead: We design ecosystems that connect life science & pharma with care delivery—secure data flow from lab to patient.
healthcare.providersLead: Patient-centered digital experiences for modern care delivery.
healthcare.interopBody: Break silos. We connect EHR, LIS, and billing with HL7 and FHIR for secure, real-time data flow and payment integrity.
healthcare.pharmaLead: Accelerate innovation and market impact with agile engineering and GxP-ready infrastructure.
healthcare.clinicalBody: Speed clinical trials with generative AI. We automate ingestion and analysis of complex medical data for faster results.
healthcare.trustTitle: Trusted engineering in a regulated world
healthcare.trustLead: Critical industries demand critical engineering. Our core capabilities span the full health spectrum.

trustPillars.title: Security & compliance
trustPillars.body: ISO 27001 certified security. HIPAA experience and infrastructure ready for GxP/FDA validation.

trustPillars.title: Data science & AI
trustPillars.body: Ethical AI models that unlock value from unstructured real-world data (RWD), medical records, and research databases.

trustPillars.title: Cloud-agnostic expertise
trustPillars.body: Deep experience across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud—optimizing architectures for performance and scale in healthcare.

trustPillars.title: Legacy modernization
trustPillars.body: Transform monolithic systems into scalable, cloud-native architectures without disrupting critical operations.
